title: carpinus putoensis
intro: Carpinus putoensis, also known as the Taiwan hop-hornbeam, is a species of deciduous tree native to Taiwan and is classified under the family Betulaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Carpinus putoensis include its potential to aid in reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting respiratory health. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve making decoctions or infusions from its bark, leaves, or twigs, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
